sql_array: CREATE TABLE people (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, birthdate TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO people (id, name, birthdate) VALUES (1, 'John Doe', TIMESTAMP '1992-09-20');
SELECT name, age(birthdate) AS age FROM people WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE people SET birthdate = TIMESTAMP '1985-05-15' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT name, age(birthdate) AS age FROM people WHERE age(birthdate) > INTERVAL '30 years';
